name: Web Expressions
description: Parser-agnostic infrastructure for dynamic content interpolation in HTML, supporting custom template syntax. Watching: the TC39 Signals proposal is tracked as the future native substrate for this layer's reactivity model — if it reaches Stage 4 / ships, evaluate deferring webexpressions reactivity to native Signals per native-first (#1269).
summary: Parser-agnostic infrastructure for dynamic content interpolation in HTML.
tierEvidence: Frontier UI's template/interpolation runtime (packages/jsx-runtime, component-compiler) consumes the parser-agnostic interpolation infrastructure — shipped constellation use.
